name: Warm Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pie plate, microwave the butter until melted.
2. Stir in almonds and microwave at High for 2 minutes or until browned, stirring often. Chop and set aside.
3. In an 8-cup casserole dish, microwave the stock, rice, and barley at High for 8 minutes or until boiling; stir.
4. Cover and microwave at Medium (50%) for 45 minutes or until tender; stir in raisins. Let stand for 10 minutes.
5. Vinaigrette: Combine wine vinegar, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Whisk in olive oil.
6. Stir the vinaigrette into the casserole; add shrimp and parsley. Mound onto lettuce-lined plate; garnish with almonds and lemon twist.
